3166540.name: Voodoo Dolls Demo
3166540.description:
Voodoo Dolls

She was taken. The music has begun. Survive the night.

On Halloween Night, an ancient Witch awakens her army of darkness. Cursed Voodoo Dolls rise from the shadows and steal Jill away to the tallest tower of a haunted castle. At sunrise, she will be sacrificed.

Jack has one night to save her.

A Music-Driven FPS With No Mercy

Voodoo Dolls is a fast-paced, retro-inspired first-person shooter where enemies spawn to the beat of an original EDM soundtrack. The music doesn’t wait for you — and neither do the dolls.

Strafe. Shoot. Survive.

Explore. Prepare. Endure.

Each chapter is divided into two brutal phases:

  • Non-linear dungeon exploration — search for ammo, keys, and magical powers while navigating maze-like levels.

  • Dance Party Arena Battles — survive relentless waves of cursed dolls summoned by the Witch in music-synced combat arenas.

Run out of ammo, and the dolls won’t stop dancing.

Built for Movement

Survival depends on constant motion. Master high-speed strafing, resource management, and precision shooting as the difficulty escalates. As you progress, unlock magical abilities that combine classic FPS gunplay with spellcasting power.

Key Features

  • 🔥 Fast, brutal 90s-inspired FPS combat

  • 🎵 30 original retro EDM tracks that drive enemy spawns

  • 🕯 Dynamic Unreal Engine 5 lighting powered by Lumen

  • 🗝 Non-linear exploration + music-based survival arenas

  • 💀 9 unique enemy types

  • 🎬 16 cinematic story sequences

  • 🎮 Multiple difficulty modes for replayability and speedrunning
3166540.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
